debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)) (input : fields 254 (F p)),
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
      (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
              Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127) =
                Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
              (Num2Bits.circuit 135 (Circomlib.CompConstant.main._proof_5 p inst✝)).Spec (env.get (offset + 127))
                  (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))) ∧
                env.get
                    (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
                  Expression.eval env
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] →
          env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
            if fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c then 1 else 0

failed_attempts:
∧ clsb == 0 then
      (b_val : F p) * smsb * slsb - (a_val : F p) * smsb + (a_val : F p)
    else
      -(a_val : F p) * smsb * slsb + (a_val : F p)

  -- Compute sum
  let sout <== parts.sum

  -- Convert sum to bits
  have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
  let bits ← Num2Bits.circuit 135 hp sout

  let out <== bits[127]
  return out

def circuit (c : ℕ) : FormalCircuit (F p) (fields 254) field where
  main := main c
  localLength _ := 127 + 1 + 135 + 1  -- parts witness + sout witness + Num2Bits + out witness
  localLength_eq := by simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
  subcircuitsConsistent input n := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
    and_intros <;> ac_rfl

  Assumptions input :=
    ∀ i (_ : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1

  Spec bits output :=
    output = if fromBits (bits.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0

  soundness := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry

theorem compconstant : ∀ (c : ℕ) (input : Vector (Expression (F p)) 254), (Circomlib.compconstant.circuit c).eval (ZMod.val ∘ input) = (if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0) := by
  intro c input
  simp only [circuit, main, eval_def, eval_const, eval_add, eval_mul, eval_sub, eval_pow, eval_and, eval_or, eval_not, eval_lt, eval_le, eval_eq, eval_iff, eval_exists, eval_forall, eval_abs, eval_neg, eval_inv, eval_id, eval_congr, eval_subst, eval_def]
  all_goals aesop

intro h1 h2
    have h3 : ∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1 ∧
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
          Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
            (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
              if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) ∧& 1 == 0 ∧ c >>> (↑i * 2) ∧& 1 == 0) = true then
                -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                    Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                  Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
              else
                if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) ∧& 1 == 0 ∧ c >>> (↑i * 2) ∧& 1 == 1) = true then
                  Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                    Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                else
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) ∧& 1 == 1 ∧ c >>> (↑i * 2) ∧& 1 == 0) = true then
                    Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                  else
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
          env.get (offset + 127) =
            Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
        (Num2Bits.circuit 135 (Circomlib.CompConstant.main._proof_5 p inst✝)).Spec (env.get (offset + 127))
            (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
              (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))) ∧
          env.get
              (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
                Expression.eval env
                  (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] →
              fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c → 1 else 0 := by
        intro i hi
        constructor
        · exact h1 i hi
        · exact h2 i hi
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      fin_cases h : input[0]
      · simp [h, Nat.succ_ne_self]
        <;> native_decide
      · simp [h, Nat.succ_ne_self]
        <;> native_decide
    | succ n ih =>
      fin_cases h : input[succ n]
      · simp [h, Nat.succ_ne_self] at ih ⊢
        <;> native_decide
      · simp [h, Nat.succ_ne_self] at ih ⊢
        <;> native_decide

<;> native_decide
    rw [h2]
    simp only [Fin.isValue, Fin.isValue, Fin.isValue, Fin.isValue, Fin.isValue]
    <;> native_decide

∧ clsb == 0 then
      (b_val : F p) * smsb * slsb - (a_val : F p) * smsb + (a_val : F p)
    else
      -(a_val : F p) * smsb * slsb + (a_val : F p)

  -- Compute sum
  let sout <== parts.sum

  -- Convert sum to bits
  have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
  let bits ← Num2Bits.circuit 135 hp sout

  let out <== bits[127]
  return out

def circuit (c : ℕ) : FormalCircuit (F p) (fields 254) field where
  main := main c
  localLength _ := 127 + 1 + 135 + 1  -- parts witness + sout witness + Num2Bits + out witness
  localLength_eq := by simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
  subcircuitsConsistent input n := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
    and_intros <;> ac_rfl

  Assumptions input :=
    ∀ i (_ : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1

  Spec bits output :=
    output = if fromBits (bits.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0

  soundness := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry

q + (a_val : F p)

  -- Compute sum
  let sout <== parts.sum

  -- Convert sum to bits
  have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
  let bits ← Num2Bits.circuit 135 hp sout

  let out <== bits[127]
  return out

def circuit (c : ℕ) : FormalCircuit (F p) (fields 254) field where
  main := main c
  localLength _ := 127 + 1 + 135 + 1  -- parts witness + sout witness + Num2Bits + out witness
  localLength_eq := by simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
  subcircuitsConsistent input n := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
    and_intros <;> ac_rfl

  Assumptions input :=
    ∀ i (_ : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1

  Spec bits output :=
    output = if fromBits (bits.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0

  soundness := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry

  complete := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry

  trivial := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry

  instances := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main]
    sorry
